title: SEC Postpones Third Quarter Capital Market Committee Meeting - FinancialEDGE
description: The Securities and Exchange Commission has announced the postponement of the Third Quarter Capital Market Committee (CMC) Meeting earlier scheduled to hold on November 14, 2024. According to a statement by the SEC, “The Commission is constrained to postpone the forthcoming Capital Market Committee meeting to allow the Commission attend to urgent regulatory commitments. “We
html: The Securities and Exchange Commission has announced the postponement of the Third Quarter Capital Market Committee (CMC) Meeting earlier scheduled to hold on November 14, 2024.
